params.name: ending_before
params.description: A cursor for use in pagination. `ending_before` is the currency that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, starting with the exchange rate for currency X your subsequent call can include `ending_before=obj_bar` in order to fetch the previous page of the list.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded.

params.name: limit
params.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Limit can range between 1 and total number of supported payout currencies, and the default is the max.

params.name: starting_after
params.description: A cursor for use in pagination. `starting_after` is the currency that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, ending with the exchange rate for currency X, your subsequent call can include `starting_after=X` in order to fetch the next page of the list.

items.docs: Returns a list of objects that contain the rates at which foreign currencies are converted to one another. Only shows the currencies for which Stripe supports.

info.name: Stripe Get   Exchange Rates Rate Id

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded.

items.docs: Retrieves the exchange rates from the given currency to every supported currency.
